title: alyssum saxatile var. variegatum
intro: Alyssum saxatile var. variegatum, also known as white flowers of the rock candy or white carpet, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant with variegated foliage and white flowers. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Alyssum saxatile var. variegatum include reducing inflammation, relieving menstrual cramps, and calming the nervous system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of conditions, from digestive issues to anxiety disorders.
